input.prompt: I need to update and align NuGet package versions across the advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx solution. Package versions have drifted out of sync — some are defined as MSBuild properties, some are conditional for multi-targeting, and there's a shared Common.props. Can you bump everything to the latest and get them consistent?

input.initialPrompt: I need to update and align NuGet package versions across the advanced-multi-complexity/Enterprise.slnx solution. Package versions have drifted out of sync — some are defined as MSBuild properties, some are conditional for multi-targeting, and there's a shared Common.props. Can you bump everything to the latest and get them consistent?

data.content: Now let me look up the latest stable versions for all packages.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
for pkg in System.Text.Json Azure.Storage.Blobs Microsoft.Extensions.Logging Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson xunit OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting; do
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/${pkg,,}/index.json" | python3 -c "import sys,json; versions=[v for v in json.load(sys.stdin)['versions'] if '-' not in v]; print(versions[-1])" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg: $ver"
done
arguments.description: Fetch latest stable NuGet package versions

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Fetch latest stable NuGet package versions

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture. Let me analyze the current state:

**Packages and their versions across projects:**

| Package | Api | Core | Legacy | Tests | Web | Common.props | Dir.Build.props |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 9.0.0 | 8.0.5 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 | - | - |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | $(BlobsVersion) = 12.24.0 | - | 12.19.0 | - | - | - | BlobsVersion=12.24.0 |


| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | - | - | - | - | - | 9.0.0 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | $(HostingVersion) = 8.0.1 | - | - | - | - | HostingVersion=8.0.1 |
| Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson | 6.0.36 (net6.0), 8.0.11 (net8.0) | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 | - | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | - | - | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |

Now I need to fetch the latest versions for all these packages from NuGet so I can update them consistently across the board.

  echo "$pkg: $ver"
done

# Get latest 6.0.x and 8.0.x versions for the framework-coupled package
curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.aspnetcore.mvc.newtonsoftjson/index.json" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
versions = json.load(sys.stdin)['versions']
stable = [v for v in versions if '-' not in v]
v6 = [v for v in stable if v.startswith('6.0.')]
v8 = [v for v in stable if v.startswith('8.0.')]
print(f'Latest 6.0.x: {v6[-1]}')
print(f'Latest 8.0.x: {v8[-1]}')
"

The latest is 10.0.8, but this project targets net6.0 and net8.0, so I need the latest for each TFM. Let me check what's available for 6.x and 8.x.

0.8 along with the Newtonsoft.Json package for net8.0 bumped to 8.0.27.
